meaning: n.[化]酒石酸氢盐,酸式酒石酸盐
examples: Such as Vincristine Sulfate, Vinorelbine Bitartrate, NHDC and Hesperidin Methyl Chalcone.
Ammonium bitartrate is filtrated and washed with water to remove Cl -, and then reacted with ammonia to give the final product dextrorotary ammonium tartrate.
AIM To investigate the expression of noradrenaline bitartrate-induced heat shock protein 70HSP70 in heart in vitro and probe into the effect of HSP70 on the function of cells in isolated rat heart.
